org.exist.dom
Class NullNodeIndexListener

java.lang.Object
  org.exist.dom.NullNodeIndexListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
NodeIndexListener
public class NullNodeIndexListener
extends java.lang.Object
implements NodeIndexListener

Applies Null Object Design Pattern

Jean-Marc Vanel - http:///jmvanel.free.fr

Constructor Detail

NullNodeIndexListener

public NullNodeIndexListener()
Method Detail

nodeChanged

public void nodeChanged(NodeImpl node)
Description copied from interface: NodeIndexListener
The internal id of a node has changed. The storage address is still the same, so one can find the changed node by comparing its storage address.

Specified by:
nodeChanged in interface NodeIndexListener
Parameters:
node -
See Also:
NodeIndexListener.nodeChanged(org.exist.dom.NodeImpl)

nodeChanged

public void nodeChanged(long oldAddress,
                        long newAddress)
Description copied from interface: NodeIndexListener
The storage address of a node has changed. This occurrs if a dom page is split during a modification.

Specified by:
nodeChanged in interface NodeIndexListener
Parameters:
oldAddress -
newAddress -
See Also:
NodeIndexListener.nodeChanged(long, long)
